todos.title: Issue 037 — Add canonical .clipper/projects/{project}/clip-order.json artifact, validation helpers, and clipper order PROJECT --reset/--show/full replacement with tests.
Issue 038 — Change clipper montage PROJECT to preserve editorial order by default, add --chronological, include order_source in manifests/JSON, and test ordering/max-duration behavior.
Issue 039 — Extend clipper order PROJECT with --move/--to and --swap operations, including initialization from clips.json, validation errors, JSON/human output, and tests.
Issue 040 — Add clipper contact-sheet PROJECT command with editorial/chronological ordering, previews, configurable thumbnail grid/output/force/JSON behavior, and tests.
Issue 041 — Add clipper trim PROJECT CLIP_ID command to update clip timing, regenerate only affected media, preserve IDs/paths, update clip-order duration, validate bounds/options, and test behavior.
Issue 042 — Update README and skills/clipper docs for canonical editorial LLM montage workflow, artifact layout, troubleshooting, examples, and obsolete candidate-order.json guidance.

iterations.summary: Implemented Issue 037: canonical project-level `.clipper/projects/{project}/clip-order.json`, schema validation, order helpers, and `clipper order PROJECT` CLI support for reset, full replacement, show, and JSON output.
iterations.commitSubject: feat: add project clip order command
